title: All impls: GNSS-PPS CCP scheduling
description: After i9r0.2 and da2q.3 pass, implement CCP v1 scheduled mode in Python, Rust, and Zephyr: GNSS hardware-PPS capture and holdover, exact capability/control codecs and signatures, recipient-paged schedule state, root authority/replay handling, slot execution/CAD, per-channel regulatory budgets, queue integration, and CH0 fallback. Nodes without valid GNSS-PPS MUST remain baseline-compatible. Do not implement gateway timing beacons, static hash reservations, or same-channel spatial reuse.
design: Implement spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md exactly from canonical vectors generated by the simulator phase. Preserve no_std/fixed-capacity constraints and existing baseline behavior when CCP is disabled.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-implementation vectors match; all CCP-16 gates remain green; Linux Zephyr native_sim and supported hardware builds pass; mixed legacy behavior and fail-closed GNSS/schedule handling are verified.
notes: Production implementation is blocked until both project-LICHEN-i9r0.2 and project-LICHEN-da2q.3 pass the canonical CCP-16 simulator gates.
